name: Storage Sheds
description:
Storage sheds solve one problem: keeping goods, stock, and raw materials dry, secure, and out of the weather without tying up floor space inside your main building. SAMAN builds them as enclosed, lockable steel-and-wood structures — the unit on this page measures 60×36×14 ft (2,160 sq ft) and is sized for warehousing, logistics holding, and bulk material storage rather than light backyard use.

What a Storage Shed Is Built to Do

A storage shed is a standalone, enclosed structure built to hold goods, inventory, or raw materials under a sealed roof behind lockable doors. Unlike an open factory bay or a workshop, its job is protection and access control — keeping stock dry, weather-shielded, and secured, so your primary premises stay clear for production or daily operations.

Drive-in access in action — pallets move straight from yard to covered, secured storage.

That single purpose drives every choice in the build: a weatherproof shell, padlock-ready entry, and a floor that takes the load of stacked or palletised goods. Secure covered storage is the whole point — not appearance, not customer footfall.

Inside the 60×36×14 ft Build — Steel Frame, Wood Infill, Weather Sealing

This configuration is a large storage shed at 2,160 sq ft of clear internal floor, built on a steel structural frame with wood infill and weather-sealed roof and wall panels. The 14 ft eave height leaves room to stack or rack goods rather than spreading them across the floor.

Inside the 2,160 sq ft shed — 14 ft eave height takes racking and stacked pallets, not just floor stock.

Doors are lockable for access control, panel joints are weather-sealed against rain and dust, and the floor is specified to carry loaded storage — not just empty volume. The prefabricated steel construction means the unit is fabricated at our works and assembled on your site, so you are not running a months-long civil build to get covered storage standing.

Matching the Shed to What You're Storing

What you store decides which features matter. A warehouse storage shed holding palletised stock has different demands from one holding loose bulk material, so it is worth matching spec to contents before you finalise size:

Sealed flooring and weather-tight panels keep bulk material — coal, clinker, gypsum — dry and contained.

What you're storing Key requirement Shed feature that handles it
Palletised inventory Floor load + height for racking Load-rated floor, 14 ft eave for stacking
Equipment & machinery Wide access + security Lockable wide doors, steel frame
Bulk material (coal, clinker, gypsum) Dust containment + sealed base Sealed flooring, weather-tight panels
Seasonal / overflow stock Dry, weatherproof holding Sealed roof, padlock-ready entry
Moisture-sensitive goods Condensation control Insulated wall and roof option

Floor load capacity and weather sealing are the two specs storage buyers most often under-size — both are set against your stored-goods type, not a default.

₹18,65,000 for the 60×36×14 ft Configuration — Included vs Custom

The 60×36×14 ft unit is priced at ₹18,65,000 (regular ₹18,95,000), and storage sheds for sale at this scale should always be quoted against a fixed size so the number is real, not a per-square-foot estimate. That price covers the steel frame, wood infill, weather-sealed roof and wall panels, lockable doors, delivery, and on-site assembly.

What's quoted separately is anything tied to your contents or site: a different footprint, added insulation for sensitive goods, extra or roller doors, ventilation for bulk material, or reinforced flooring for heavier point loads. Tell us what's going inside and we size the shed to it.

Storage Shed or Warehouse — Which Covered-Storage Format Fits

Storage shed versus warehouse — scale tells you which covered-storage format your operation needs.

A storage shed and a warehouse both keep goods covered, but they are not the same purchase. At 2,160 sq ft, this storage shed suits secure, enclosed holding for a single operation. If you need a far larger column-free span for forklift aisles and high-volume logistics, a clear-span prefabricated warehouse is the format to compare. If the unit has to move between sites as your work shifts, look at a relocatable portable shed instead. And if the building fronts customers — a counter, showroom, or service bay — that's a customer-facing commercial shed, not storage. Where steel grade and structural life are the deciding factors over storage function, our steel shed range covers that brief.

From Quote to an Installed Storage Shed

From order to installed unit — storage sheds dropped into working logistics yards across India.

Buying is direct: send the size and what you're storing, we return a quote and a layout drawing, then fabricate, deliver, and assemble on your prepared site. This storage shed is part of SAMAN's industrial shed range, built and dispatched from our Bangalore and Greater Noida units to sites across India, so "where to buy" is answered by a single manufacturer rather than a reseller chain.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much do storage sheds cost?

This 60×36×14 ft (2,160 sq ft) configuration is ₹18,65,000, including frame, weather-sealed panels, lockable doors, delivery, and assembly. Smaller or larger sheds are quoted against your size and spec, since price scales with footprint, insulation, and door count.

Where to buy storage sheds?

Directly from SAMAN. We manufacture at units in Bangalore and Greater Noida and deliver and install pan-India, so you order from the maker — not a middle-man — and deal with one point of contact from quote to handover.

What's the difference between a storage shed and a warehouse?

A storage shed is a secure, enclosed unit for holding goods or materials at a defined footprint. A warehouse is a much larger clear-span building for high-volume logistics, forklift movement, and distribution. Choose by scale and how goods move, not by name alone.

Can a storage shed be insulated for moisture-sensitive goods?

Yes. Insulated wall and roof panels are an option where condensation or temperature swings would damage stored stock — specify it at quote stage so it's built in, not retrofitted.

Get a Storage Shed Quote

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937

Send your size and what you plan to store — we'll quote the shed built around it.

Secure, weatherproof 60×36×14 ft storage shed

Enclosed steel-and-wood storage built for warehousing, logistics, and bulk material — padlock-ready and weather-sealed.
Size / Capacity
60×36×14 ft / 2,160 sqft
Frame / Panel
Steel frame, wood infill
Price / Delivery
₹18,65,000 / Pan-India
Floor Load / Relocations
Load-rated / Fixed site
Made by SAMAN Portable
Custom sizes on quote
